title: Province Build Advisor
content: A province build should match its race, personality, battlefield role, and kingdom strategy.

title: Offensive Province
content: Offensive provinces prioritize military offense, attack strength, and land gaining ability.

title: Defensive Province
content: Defensive provinces prioritize defense, survival, and protecting kingdom resources.

title: Mage Province
content: Mage provinces prioritize wizards, rune supply, and effective spell usage.

title: Thief Province
content: Thief provinces prioritize thieves, intelligence operations, and sabotage effectiveness.

title: Hybrid Province Advisor
content: Hybrid provinces balance multiple abilities and require careful management of military, magic, and thievery.

title: Building Efficiency
content: Building Efficiency affects province performance and should be maintained when possible.

title: Population Management
content: Population management balances peasants, military units, thieves, and wizards for optimal performance.

title: Military Balance
content: Military balance considers offense, defense, losses, and the province's battlefield purpose.

title: Economy Management
content: Economy management keeps a province supplied with gold, food, and resources needed for growth and war.

title: Science Planning
content: Science development improves province capabilities and should support the chosen role.

title: Training Strategy
content: Military training timing affects readiness, costs, and war preparation.

title: Draft Management
content: Draft levels affect military size, economy, and province performance.

title: War Preparation Checklist
content: Before war, prepare military, spells, thieves, resources, and communication plans.

title: Post War Recovery Advisor
content: After war, focus on rebuilding buildings, military, economy, and long-term province health.

title: Target Evaluation Advisor
content: Evaluate enemy provinces using networth, defense, offense, race, personality, and available intel.
